name: part-registry
description: Production-grade MCP server with authentication, rate limiting, audit logging, and three interfaces (MCP + REST + CLI).

tools.name: decodePart
tools.description: Decode a part number and return its full attributes: make, model, category, and vehicle compatibility range.

part_number.description: The part number to look up (e.g. 'P-1001'). Uppercase letters, a hyphen, and digits.

tools.name: validatePart
tools.description: Check whether a part number exists and is active. Returns valid: true or false. Never errors on unknown parts.

tools.name: getPartInfo
tools.description: Validate and decode in a single call. Use this for order processing or intake workflows where you need both validity status and attributes together.

part_number.description: The part number to look up (e.g. 'P-1001').
